disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe burning pain on passing urine, of sudden onset within the last day
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It burns and stings really badly every single time I wee, like peeing glass. It started out of nowhere yesterday.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked urinary frequency and urgency, passing only small volumes
trigger_question_examples: How often are you going to the toilet?
Do you feel a sudden urge to go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm running to the toilet every ten minutes and only a tiny bit comes out, then straight away I feel like I need to go again.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Visible blood in the urine (patient-observed pink/red discolouration)
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it's bright pink, there's clearly blood in it, and that's what frightened me the most.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dull suprapubic (lower abdominal) ache with a sense of incomplete bladder emptying
trigger_question_examples: Any pain in your lower tummy?
Do you feel like you empty your bladder fully?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache low down above my pubic bone, and I never feel like I've fully emptied even after I go.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no rigors/shaking chills, and no flank or back pain (patient-reported pertinent negatives)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have a fever or shaking chills?
Any pain in your back or the sides of your tummy?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have a fever — I checked and it was normal — no shaking or chills, and no pain in my back or sides.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Onset shortly after sexual intercourse without post-coital voiding
trigger_question_examples: Was there anything that seemed to bring it on?
Had you been sexually active recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It did seem to start a day or so after I had sex, and I didn't go to the toilet afterwards.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'd rather not go into the personal side of it if that's okay.

trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance you could be pregnant?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm honestly not sure — I haven't checked, and my period isn't super regular.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reduced fluid intake because passing urine is painful
trigger_question_examples: How much have you been drinking today?
Have you been able to keep your fluids up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Not much at all — I've been avoiding water because I dread how much it hurts to wee.
